content:
I'm a self-taught full-stack developer based in Lagos, Nigeria, building

products under the Easywise brand — handling everything from backend

and database design to polished frontend UI, solo, end to end.

What I work with: React, React Native, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Expo, Next.js

A few things I've built recently:

• 🛒 EasyGet — a multi-role marketplace app (customers, shop owners,
riders) with real-time orders, chat, and even a diaspora feature so
Nigerians abroad can send groceries home

• 🏠 EasyHomes — a property discovery platform for Lagos, with an
interactive map and agent dashboards

• 💱 EasyRates — a live currency tracker comparing official vs black
market exchange rates

I also take on freelance web and mobile work. You can check out

everything I'm building at easywise.com.ng.

Would love to connect with other devs building in Nigeria/Africa, or

anyone working on marketplace/fintech products. Say hi! 👋
